name: ability_demo

deferred_resolve: /tellraw @s every deferred consequence resolves at once

history: [turn 0 · no active turn] /character new demo
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo fear 50
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo regret 30
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo joy 20
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo envy 15
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo speed 5
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo mana 100
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo mana_regen 5
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo luck 25
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo footnote 0
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo steps 0
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo campfire_heat 0
[turn 0 · no active turn] /stat new demo debt 0

[turn 0 · no active turn] /function edit corpse_contract
/tellraw @s your corpse honors the contract

[turn 0 · no active turn] /function edit predators_bureaucracy
/tellraw @s you seize the fallen's burdens

[turn 0 · no active turn] /function edit deferred_resolve
/tellraw @s every deferred consequence resolves at once

[turn 0 · no active turn] /ability new demo emotional_alchemy{name:"Emotional Alchemy",cost:[stat.fear(10)],cooldown:3,on_hit:[stat.speed(10)],description:"FULLY SUPPORTED. Consume an emotion to gain a resource. Built: fear->speed. Same pattern: regret->mana, joy->health, envy->critical_scale."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /ability new demo emotional_alchemy_regret{name:"Emotional Alchemy: Regret",cost:[stat.regret(10)],cooldown:3,on_hit:[stat.mana(10)],description:"FULLY. Second variant of the same cost/on_hit pattern: regret -> mana."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /ability new demo borrowed_tomorrow{name:"Borrowed Tomorrow",cost:[stat.mana(20)],cooldown:5,on_hit:[stat.mana(30)],description:"PARTIAL. Cost models the reserved mana; on_hit grants the burst (next turns of regen up front). Halting future regen until repaid is a flag the DM tracks (regen is automatic)."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /ability new demo bureau_of_coincidences{name:"Bureau of Coincidences",cost:[stat.luck(10)],cooldown:4,description:"PARTIAL. The luck cost is enforced; the converging coincidences are narrated by the DM."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /ability new demo infinite_campfire{name:"Infinite Campfire",on_hit:[stat.campfire_heat(5)],cooldown:1,description:"PARTIAL. Burning an item adds permanent heat (campfire_heat accumulates, never drops). DM removes the burned item and picks the value."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /ability new demo paradox_engine{name:"Paradox Engine",description:"NOT SUPPORTED. Energy proportional to how impossible a contradiction is - unquantifiable. DM sets any gain by hand."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /talent new demo predators_bureaucracy{name:"Predator's Bureaucracy",proc:[{enemy_killed:true}],reaction:[/function predators_bureaucracy],description:"PARTIAL. Fires when you pulse enemy_killed. Runs a function for what transfers; you decide which effects/quests carry over."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /talent new demo contract_with_future_corpse{name:"Contract With Future Corpse",proc:[{died:true}],reaction:[/function corpse_contract],description:"WELL SUPPORTED. On death (died proc) your corpse runs a contract function. The contract is whatever you put in that function."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /talent new demo living_footnote{name:"Living Footnote",proc:[{footnote_full:true}],description:"PARTIAL. footnote stat tracks stacks (DM pulses when you are referenced indirectly). At 100, pulse footnote_full to trigger the rewrite (DM adjudicates)."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /talent new demo conservation_of_narrative{name:"Conservation of Narrative",proc:[{died:true,plot_armor:true}],reaction:[stat.health(1)],description:"PARTIAL. With plot_armor enabled, dying instead leaves you at 1 hp. DM toggles plot_armor by narrative tension."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /talent new demo apotheosis_of_the_mundane{name:"Apotheosis of the Mundane",proc:[{walked_enough:true}],description:"PARTIAL. Track an ordinary action as a stat (e.g. steps). At a threshold, pulse walked_enough to unlock the supernatural version (DM grants the flag/ability)."}
[turn 0 · no active turn] /talent new demo statistical_outlier{name:"Statistical Outlier",description:"NOT SUPPORTED. Needs to hook arbitrary event probabilities. Pure DM ruling."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /effect new demo deferred_consequences{name:"Deferred Consequences",duration:4,step:-1,reaction:[/function deferred_resolve],description:"PARTIAL. Lasts ~30s (4 turns); on the last turn runs deferred_resolve. You append each stored consequence to that function during the window."}

[turn 0 · no active turn] /effect new demo echo_debt{name:"Echo Debt (cost)",duration:8,description:"PARTIAL. The 60s self-debuff as a timed effect. The ability-copy/delay/proximity core stays DM-run."}
[turn 0 · no active turn] /session save ability_demo

[turn 0 · no active turn] /function edit borrowed_tomorrow
/stat modify @s multiplier max_mana add -0.1
/stat modify @s multiplier mana_regen set 0
/stat modify @s mana add 30

[turn 0 · no active turn] /ability modify demo borrowed_tomorrow {cooldown:1,cost:[],on_hit:[/function borrowed_tomorrow],description:"FULLY (you were right). Reserve = max_mana mult -0.1; halt regen = mana_regen mult 0; burst = +30 mana - all via an on_hit function. Repaying restores the mults (DM, by fiction)."}

demo.name: demo

formulas.health: IF(stat.max_health > 0, MIN(stat.health + stat.health_regen * DELTA(stat.turn), stat.max_health), stat.health + stat.health_regen * DELTA(stat.turn))
formulas.mana: IF(stat.max_mana > 0, MIN(stat.mana + stat.mana_regen * DELTA(stat.turn), stat.max_mana), stat.mana + stat.mana_regen * DELTA(stat.turn))
formulas.bludgeon_penetration: LET(pen, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_penetration) * (1 - stat.bludgeon_penetration_base)), IF(pen > stat.bludgeon_penetration_cap, stat.bludgeon_penetration_cap, pen))
formulas.pierce_penetration: LET(pen, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_penetration) * (1 - stat.pierce_penetration_base)), IF(pen > stat.pierce_penetration_cap, stat.pierce_penetration_cap, pen))
formulas.slash_penetration: LET(pen, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_penetration) * (1 - stat.slash_penetration_base)), IF(pen > stat.slash_penetration_cap, stat.slash_penetration_cap, pen))
formulas.bludgeon_resistance: LET(resist, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_resistance) * (1 - stat.bludgeon_resistance_base)), IF(resist > stat.bludgeon_resistance_cap, stat.bludgeon_resistance_cap, resist))
formulas.pierce_resistance: LET(resist, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_resistance) * (1 - stat.pierce_resistance_base)), IF(resist > stat.pierce_resistance_cap, stat.pierce_resistance_cap, resist))
formulas.slash_resistance: LET(resist, 1 - ((1 - stat.physical_resistance) * (1 - stat.slash_resistance_base)), IF(resist > stat.slash_resistance_cap, stat.slash_resistance_cap, resist))

talents: predators_bureaucracy{level:1,description:"PARTIAL. Fires when you pulse enemy_killed. Runs a function for what transfers; you decide which effects/quests carry over.",origin:"",proc:[{enemy_killed:true}],reaction:[predators_bureaucracy],name:"Predator's Bureaucracy",uuid:"tl-Tkj0"}
